issues.description: Trigger should be 'EndOfTurn', not 'Activated'. Card text explicitly states '[End of Your Turn]'
Condition should check if Leader has {Donquixote Pirates} type using 'LeaderHasType', not generic 'HasCardOnBoard'. Current condition does not verify the required type.
Action should be 'AttachDon' (attach DON!! from deck to Leader), not 'GiveDon'. GiveDon adds DON!! tokens; AttachDon attaches physical DON!! cards from deck.
Missing duration field. '[End of Your Turn]' implies duration:'DuringYourTurn' or similar temporal scope, not a one-time trigger.
